sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْكَافِي ضَرُورِيٌّ جِدًّا لِصِحَّةِ الْعَقْلِ وَالْبَدَنِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno sna je veoma važno za zdravlje uma i tijela.
sentences.translationEn: Sufficient sleep is very necessary for the health of the mind and body.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْإِنْسَانُ الْبَالِغُ إِلَى ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ مِنَ الرَّاحَةِ لَيْلًا.
sentences.translation: Odrasla osoba treba osam sati odmora noću.
sentences.translationEn: An adult needs eight hours of rest at night.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ النَّوْمُ الْمُبَكِّرُ عَلَى زِيَادَةِ التَّرْكِيزِ فِي الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Rano spavanje pomaže u povećanju koncentracije na poslu.
sentences.translationEn: Early sleep helps increase concentration at work.
